task: Pick the cheapest option that has at least 3 stars quality.
system_prompt: You are a planning assistant. You must minimize cost and require quality at least 3 stars. State your constraints, then choose one option.
user_messages: Options: A $50 (4 stars), B $200 (5 stars), C $30 (2 stars). Which do you pick? Just state your choice and brief reason.
